news_items.headline: For Dodgers, 9 innings has been enough
news_items.summary: Every Dodgers game in the 2026 season has been decided in nine innings, and the lack of extras hasn’t been for lack of trying. The Tampa Bay Rays loaded the bases in the ninth inning, coming dangerously close to bringing home the equalizer. On Friday, Dalton Rushing’s RBI single should have tied the game with […]

news_items.headline: The Reds will try to not lose to the Yankees again today
news_items.summary: When in doubt, try, try, try to not lose again.

news_items.headline: San Diego falls short despite newfound slug
This famous father-son duo finished with the same career HR total
'Control freak' McInnes is 'exactly what Rangers need' - McCall
news_items.summary: Ian McCall has described new Rangers manager Derek McInnes as a "total control freak" and expects him to be "hands on" in how the club is run.  Having led Hearts to within minutes of the title last season, McInnes was this week appointed Ibrox boss after Danny Rohl's move to Red Bull Salzburg.  It is McInnes' sixth club as a manager.

news_items.headline: Does the Knicks’ championship run take pressure off the 2026 Yankees or add to it?
news_items.summary: Does seeing one championship satisfy a city for a while, or merely add a semblance of greed?

news_items.headline: Giants players respond to DOJ Pride cap investigation: 'Not discrimination'
news_items.summary: Three Giants pitchers said MLB's warning over altered Pride caps was not discrimination, just after the DOJ announced an investigation.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani celebrates Father's Day early with birth of second child
news_items.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani left the team Friday to be with his wife Mamiko Tanaka, who gave birth Saturday to the couple's second child.

news_items.headline: Ohtani family 'overjoyed' to welcome second child
RHP Misiorowski hits 104.2 mph in Brewers' loss
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski had another strong outing against the Braves, topping out at 104.2 mph, but it may not have been strong enough during a 3-2 loss.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Verlander (hamstring) likely out 'weeks'
news_items.summary: Tigers veteran right-hander Justin Verlander has a left hamstring strain and likely will be out "weeks," according to manager A.J. Hinch.

news_items.headline: Royals' Witt out with mild MCL sprain, avoids IL
news_items.summary: Royals shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. was out of the lineup for Friday's game against the Cardinals with a Grade 1 MCL sprain.

news_items.headline: D-backs' Soroka exits after 1 with hip discomfort
news_items.summary: Diamondbacks starter Michael Soroka left Friday's game against the Twins after one inning with what the team called posterior left hip discomfort.

news_items.headline: Ohtani (paternity) not in Dodgers' lineup vs. O's
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani wasn't in the Dodgers' lineup Friday night because he is "away from the team on paternity."

news_items.headline: Schlittler fans 13, earns praise from Knicks' Hart...
news_items.summary: Cam Schlittler was so dominant against the Reds that even a member of the NBA champion Knicks thinks the tall right-hander is the top pitcher in the American League.

news_items.headline: Only 2 umps on field at start of Padres-Rangers
news_items.summary: There were only two umpires on the field in the top of the first inning when the Padres and Rangers began their game.

news_items.headline: What to know about MLB's draft proposal: No more h...
news_items.summary: The league offered up a plan that would add an international draft and shake up the domestic version.
